content.en:
The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the others understood this very well in their hearts, so they did not continue to discuss this.

"Has the strength of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors been roughly estimated?"

The Dark Domain Ancestor asked.

"It's almost estimated!" Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor said, "According to our speculation, even if he is included in refining the Soul Saint Realm Flower, he should still possess several perfection-level holy skills, and it is unlikely that he will have an extreme level holy skill." Coupled with his potential and foundation, all kinds of factors are taken into account, and his current strength should barely reach the four-star king level!"

"Four-star king level, isn't it too high to think of him? Most of the Saint Endowments have just stepped into the peak of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, even if the Soul Holy Light is born, their strength is at most a four-star master level. Unless the Soul Holy Light of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor was born a lot, but he only had one Soul Saint Realm Flower, and the Soul Holy Light was estimated to be only a little bit, where could he have such a strong strength?" a four-star master questioned.

"Don't think of the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain as an ordinary Saint Endowment, he has many Saint Endowments, he has mastered a lot of Saint Endowments, and his strength and foundation are far beyond those of ordinary Saint Endowments, so we must treat him as a four-star king, otherwise we will not send our two four-star kings to make a move!" said the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor solemnly.

Two four-star kings, seven four-star masters, plus other supreme domain ancestors, this is enough to be equivalent to three four-star kings.

What's more, there is also a difference between a four-star king and a four-star king, just like the strongest domain ancestor on the strongest list, the gap between the strongest and the weakest is also extremely huge, and the strongest domain ancestor who ranks first in the battle gate, it is estimated that it is also very simple to kill a strong domain ancestor like the herring domain ancestor!

Therefore, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor were very confident that they would be able to kill Ye Tian, after all, their strength was very strong, far surpassing the first-grade combat power of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, which was comparable to the top fifty on the Battle Gate Supreme Power List.

With such strength, coupled with careful preparation, he will definitely be able to kill Ye Tian.

Subsequently, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor began to discuss how to carry out the assassination.

Going straight into the human world, that's not a good choice.

After all, the human realm is the headquarters of the human race, and Ye Tian has built countless large arrays there, and maybe even a formation arranged with holy relics as a foundation.

If they directly enter the human realm, they will have a high chance of failure.

After all, Ye Tian is not alone, he is still the strongest domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, once he is attacked, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate will inevitably make a move.

Ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors, they don't care yet, but the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor is still here.

Once the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor came to their aid, their assassination would inevitably fail.

Therefore, once the shot is made, Ye Tian must be dealt with at an extremely fast speed.

However, there is one last problem for the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor.

"The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain has a special clone, which is similar to the main body, if it is impossible to confirm his clone, and it is his clone that causes us to attack, then it will be assassinated in vain!"

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor reminded.

The Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor took out a piece of information: "According to our information, the essence of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor has been practicing in retreat in the human realm, and his clones often appear all over the Xuanxu Saint Realm. We can send someone to implicate the doppelganger of the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, and then send someone to infiltrate the human realm and arrest the family of the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, so as to draw out the essence of the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain. In this way, we will attack the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor with all our might!"

"This way it works!"

Others agreed.

Although this method is shameless, they don't care about it in order to complete the task.

As long as you can kill Ye Tian and complete the task, it will be worth anything.

Subsequently.

The people of the Ghost Fox Organization began to arrange their plans and took action one after another.

this day.

Some of the Terran Domain Ancestors have conflicts with outsiders, and the comparison of the Terran Domain Ancestors is far from rising, and any one of the strongest Domain Ancestors can suppress a large number of Terran Domain Ancestors.

As a result, those foreign domain ancestors detained the Terran domain ancestors, and asked Ye Tian to apologize and compensate them, so that those Terran domain ancestors would be released.

Ye Tian knew that someone was making trouble, so he naturally sent a copy body to deal with it.

However, after arriving, those domain ancestors were involved with Ye Tian, because the behavior of these domain ancestors was not excessive, and there were many domain ancestors who were watching the excitement around, Ye Tian couldn't kill them, which would undoubtedly affect his reputation and affect the reputation of the human race.

In desperation, Ye Tian could only reason with this group of domain ancestors.

Ye Tian could also see that this group of domain ancestors was completely messing around.

It stands to reason that they have all reached the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, so there is no need to mess around like this.

Besides, this is the territory of the Terrans, so it is really not good to do so.

Ye Tian could also see that the Domain Ancestor of the Terran was indeed at fault, but it seemed that he had fallen into a trap, everything was a planned action, deliberately pitting the Domain Ancestor of the Terran Race.

Ye Tian didn't know what the purpose of these domain ancestors was, but they would definitely expose their purpose.

The human world.

Ye Tian's body was cultivating, and at this moment, a Supreme Domain Ancestor infiltrated the human realm.

This Supreme Domain Ancestor disguised himself as a Terran and followed a Terran into the Human Realm without being discovered by anyone.

This Supreme Domain Ancestor is not an ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor, but a four-star master-level member of the Ghost Fox Organization, the Water Moon Domain Ancestor, whose strength is comparable to that of the first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor.

This kind of Supreme Domain Ancestor, even if he encounters a weaker Supreme Domain Ancestor, there is hope to escape.

That's why the Ghost Fox Organization sent this Supreme Domain Ancestor to infiltrate the human realm.

After the Water Moon Domain Ancestor entered the human realm, he began to investigate the situation of Ye Tian's family.

In the end, she locked on one person - Ye Yu!

Ye Yu is Ye Tian's younger sister, and now she is only at the top of the domain ancestor cultivation, although her strength is not weak, but it is not very strong.

For the Water Moon Domain Ancestor, he is undoubtedly an ant, and more importantly, Ye Yu is not practicing in retreat now, but guiding the cultivation of the geniuses of the human race somewhere in the human world, and his whereabouts are very locked.

this day.

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor came to the place where Ye Yu was, and saw Ye Yu preaching in a cultivation treasure land.

Abrupt.

The Water Moon Domain Ancestor has made a move!

"Not good!"

Ye Yu was shocked.

She knew that there was a Supreme Domain Ancestor who had attacked her, and the strength of the other party was terrifying.

At this moment, the void froze, and she couldn't escape.

Immediately, she urged one life-saving thing after another, and sent it to her brother Ye Tian.

However, the other party did not intend to kill her immediately, but directly cut off the space where she was, sealed it, and fell into the hands of the other party.

Wow!

After Shui Yue easily grabbed Ye Yu, she immediately began to escape, preparing to escape from the human world.

Her purpose is to lure Ye Tian out of the human world and besiege Ye Tian in the territory outside the human world.
